title: Potsdam from Berlin - Quick Summary
items: **Potsdam needs Berlin ABC, not AB.** Potsdam sits in fare zone C, so check an ABC ticket or pass before you leave Berlin.
**Make Sanssouci the anchor, not the whole day.** Book or check the palace slot first if you want the interior, then keep the afternoon flexible.
**Do not overfill the route.** Sanssouci Park, New Palace, Dutch Quarter, Cecilienhof and Glienicke Bridge are too much for one relaxed first visit.
**Cecilienhof needs a current closure check.** SPSG currently lists Cecilienhof Country House as closed for restoration, so do not build the day around an interior visit.
**End with an easy return.** A good Potsdam day is one that still leaves enough energy for dinner back in Berlin.
